sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83346" key="*pitta/keios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Πιττάκειος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n83346.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of Pittacus</tr_> : <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ Π</foreign>. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the saying of P.</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:5:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
